items.title: Cohere acquires, merges with Germany-based startup to create a ‘transatlantic AI powerhouse’
items.summary: Cohere, the Canada-based AI company that makes AI tools for businesses in regulated industries, announced Friday it would merge with Aleph Alpha, a German company that also builds AI systems for businesses and governments.

items.title: Apple’s new CEO, and why Elon Musk wants to buy Cursor for $60B
items.summary: A new era is on the way for Apple as Tim Cook plans to step down from his CEO role in September, handing the reins to hardware chief John Ternus.   Ternus may be inheriting one of the most durable businesses in tech, but he’s also stepping into a very different ecosystem than the one Cook spent decades shaping. The App […]

items.title: Tim Cook is stepping down. What happens to Apple now?
items.summary: Tim Cook plans to step down from his CEO role in September, handing the reins to hardware chief John Ternus.   Ternus may be inheriting one of the most durable businesses in tech, but he’s also stepping into a very different ecosystemthan the one Cook spent decades shaping. The App Store’s 30% cut is under pressure, the behind-the-scenes power Apple once […]

items.title: Don’t stop hiring humans — stop hiring the wrong humans, Artisan’s founder says
items.summary: Artisan may be known for their bold “Stop Hiring Humans” campaign but the reality is every founder needs to assemble the right team if they want to scale.

items.title: Esther and Anne Wojcicki back new  healthcare accelerator, fund
items.summary: Mary Minno launches early-stage startup accelerator program, Treehub, and an early-stage firm, AI Health Fund, aimed at backing startups working at the intersection of healthcare and AI.

items.title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing
items.summary: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.

items.title: Roblox’s AI assistant gets new agentic tools to plan, build, and test games
items.summary: The new tools are designed to help creators throughout the entire development process.

items.title: Accel raises $5B to back late-stage bets
items.summary: Accel announced on Tuesday that it raised $5 billion in fresh capital to back late-stage companies building AI.

items.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
items.summary: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.

items.title: At the HumanX conference, everyone was talking about Claude
items.summary: Anthropic was the star of the show at San Francisco's AI-centric conference.

items.title: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.

items.title: Anthropic debuts preview of powerful new AI model Mythos in new cybersecurity initiative
items.summary: The new model will be used by a small number of high-profile companies to engage in defensive cybersecurity work.

items.title: Google Translate’s real-time headphone translations feature expands to iOS and more countries
items.summary: The real-time headphone translations experience keeps each speaker’s tone, emphasis, and cadence intact, so it’s easier to follow the conversation and tell who’s saying what.

items.title: Google is launching Search Live globally
items.summary: Search Live allows users to point their phone camera at objects to get real-time assistance, enabling back-and-forth conversations that draw on the visual context from the camera feed.

items.title: WhatsApp can now draft AI-generated responses based on your conversations
items.summary: The Meta-owned messaging platform is also launching a way to free up space, the ability to touch up photos with Meta AI, and more.

items.title: After pivoting, Y Combinator grad Glimpse raises $35M led by a16z
items.summary: Glimpse announced on Wednesday a $35 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz, with participation from 8VC and YC.

items.title: Snapchat’s new ‘AI Clips’ Lens format turns photos into five-second videos
items.summary: Snapchat says both experienced and new developers can use the new "AI Clips" Lens format to turn a single prompt into a published Lens in minutes without the need for external tools.

items.title: AI startups are eating the venture industry and the returns, so far, are good
items.summary: AI startups accounted for 41% of the $128 billion in venture dollars raised by companies on Carta last year — a record-high annual share.

items.title: Employees had to restrain a dancing humanoid robot after it went wild at a California restaurant
items.summary: A dancing robot in a Haidilao hot pot restaurant boogied down a little too hard.
